name: Happy Endings Plum Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the plums well and reserve the syrup. Chop the plums.
2. Preheat the oven to 400°F. In a large mixing bowl, beat the butter until creamy and light.
3. Gradually add the sugars, beating until creamy and smooth.
4. Beat in the eggs, then the vanilla extract.
5. Sift together all dry ingredients; stir into the butter mixture, alternating with half cup of the reserved syrup, beginning and ending with dry ingredients.
6. Stir in the plums.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch x 13-inch baking pan.
8. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center tests clean.
9. Turn the cake out of the pan and cool on a wire rack.
10. Dust with confectioners' sugar.
